reason: Enabling FIPS mode requires modifying kernel boot arguments and cryptographic policy, which is not supported on an already installed system and can cause system instability or loss of access. The change is permanent, needs a reboot, and may affect authentication services, making it too risky to remediate automatically.
estimated_impact: reboot required; authentication/authorization affected; kernel_parameter_change; fips_mode; potential_system_instability; bootloader_modification
